02

Carbon & Climate Solutions

From inventory to offset, we provide the technical architecture for your Net Zero journey. We calculate, verify, and mitigate your carbon footprint across all Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions.

Climate Roadmap

What's Included

Technical infrastructure for the Net-Zero transition.

EU REGULATION · CARBON TAX

CBAM Advisory & Reporting

Helping Indian exporters navigate the EU's Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism technical requirements to minimize financial exposure and border taxes.

  • Embedded emissions auditing
  • "Actual Emissions" method support
  • Quarterly CBAM report preparation
  • Supply chain data coordination
  • Financial exposure modeling
Learn More
EMISSIONS AUDIT · SCOPE 1-3

GHG Inventory & Accounting

Comprehensive calculation of your greenhouse gas footprint according to the GHG Protocol Corporate Standard. We map category-specific emissions for absolute transparency.

  • Scope 1, 2, 3 inventory baseline
  • Category-specific emissions mapping
  • Data quality & assurance readiness
  • Organizational & operational boundaries
  • Supplier-specific emission factors
Learn More
ISO 14064 · THIRD PARTY

GHG Verification (ISO 14064)

Independent verification of your GHG assertions to ensure accuracy, consistency, and transparency, providing stakeholders with verified climate data.

  • ISO 14064-1 compliance audit
  • Verification statement preparation
  • Inventory quality management
  • Stakeholder assurance reports
  • Continuous monitoring systems
Learn More
LIFECYCLE ASSESSMENT · ISO 14067

Organisational & Product Carbon Footprint

Quantifying the carbon footprint of individual products and entire organizational operations using ISO compliant LCA modeling for customer transparency.

  • ISO 14067 compliant LCA modeling
  • Eco-design optimization analysis
  • Environmental Product Declarations (EPD)
  • Product-level decarbonization
  • Customer transparency reporting
Learn More
OFFSETTING · VERIFIED CREDITS

Carbon Credits

Selecting and implementing high-integrity carbon removal and avoidance projects to neutralize residual emissions.

  • Nature-based solutions (NbS)
  • VERRA/GS project due diligence
  • Carbon removal portfolio strategy
  • Article 6 compliance advisory
  • Risk & integrity management
Learn More
RE100 · RENEWABLE ENERGY

I-REC Certification

Technical expertise in procuring and managing International Renewable Energy Certificates (I-RECs) to meet global clean energy targets.

  • I-REC/TIGR procurement strategy
  • RE100 alignment support
  • Cross-border attribute tracking
  • Impactful energy sourcing
  • Redemption & reporting services
Learn More

The climate challenge

Carbon accounting is no longer just about direct emissions.

01

Scope 3 Blindspots

90% of a company's impact often lies in its supply chain. Measuring this accurately requires complex data modeling and supplier engagement.

02

Greenwashing Risk

Stakeholders are aggressively scrutinizing Net Zero claims. Without rigorous, science-based verification, companies face significant reputation damage.

03

Carbon Pricing

New border taxes like CBAM are turning carbon into a direct financial liability. Managing your footprint is now a core fiscal responsibility.

Net Zero Protocol

A technical path to total decarbonization.

01

Inventory

  • Scope 1, 2, 3 Audit
  • GHG Protocol Modeling
  • Emissions Mapping
02

Targeting

  • SBTi Alignment
  • Net Zero Forecast
  • Baseline Setting
03

Mitigation

  • Energy Efficiency
  • Supply Chain Reform
  • Tech Upgrades
04

Offsetting

  • Verified Credits
  • Project Development
  • Continuous Audit

Climate Assets

We deliver a full technical suite for your carbon management.

SBTi Approved Roadmap
CBAM Impact Audit
Supply Chain Scorecard

Measurement Standards

Rigorous protocols for high-precision carbon accounting.

Inventory Protocols
  • GHG Protocol Corporate Standard (Revised Edition)
  • ISO 14064-1 Organization-level quantification & reporting
  • PAS 2060 Specification for Carbon Neutrality
  • WRI/WBCSD Scope 3 Calculation Guidance
Regulatory Analysis
  • EU CBAM Transitional phase reporting (Q1 2024+)
  • SEC Climate Rule Scope 1 & 2 disclosure requirements
  • SBTi Corporate 1.5°C near-term and Net-Zero targets
  • CDP Climate Full disclosure support & scoring optimization

Common Questions

Clarifying carbon and climate complexities.

Scope 1 covers direct emissions from owned or controlled sources. Scope 2 covers indirect emissions from the generation of purchased electricity, steam, heating, and cooling. Scope 3 includes all other indirect emissions that occur in a company’s value chain, including both upstream and downstream emissions.
The Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) requires exporters of carbon-intensive goods (steel, cement, aluminum, etc.) to the EU to report their carbon footprints and, eventually, pay for their emissions. We help businesses quantify these footprints to ensure continued EU market access.
SBTi provides a clearly-defined pathway for companies to reduce greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions, helping prevent the worst effects of climate change and future-proof business growth. Targets are considered "science-based" if they are in line with what latest climate science deems necessary to meet the goals of the Paris Agreement.
GHG Protocol ISO 14064 SBTi Aligned CBAM Specialist
